title: Screwdriver Set 10pcs, Magnetic Screwdriver Set 5pcs Phillips Screwdrivers and 5pcs Slotted/Flat Head Screwdrivers, Chrome Vanadium Steel Made
features: 🔩【Premium Material】The screwdrivers are made of chrome vanadium steel with heat treatment. High hardness, good toughness, wear resistance, corrosion resistance, durable. Not easy to deform and break.

🔩【Strong Magnetic Tips】Each screwdriver has a strong magnetic tip, you can easily hold and pick up the screws, making it easier and faster to arrange the screws, effectively prevent the screws from falling and losing.The screwdriver head can be magnetized or demagnetized with the included magnetic tool.

🔩【Ergonomic Design】The ergonomic anti-slip handle is made of PP and TPR, which provides the anti-slip and high performance of the grip. Provides a stronger grip and reduces hand fatigue; There are holes in the handle for easy hanging storage.

🔩【10 Pcs Screwdriver Set】5 flat head size: 6 x 38mm, 3 x 75mm, 4 x 75mm, 5 x 100mm, 6 x 125mm, 5 phillips head size: 6 x 38mm, 3 x 75mm, 4 x 75mm, 5 x 100mm, 6 x 125mm, the size is marked on the handle for easy identification.

🔩【Wide Applications】The high-performance magnetic screwdriver set has a sturdy, wear resistance design and comes with a dedicated storage bag, making it perfect for all types of work, including building, electrical, mechanical, engineering, DIY and home/domestic use and general hobbyists.
description: Product Description 10pcs Magnetic Screwdriver Set Specification: 5 Flat head size: 6 x 38mm, 3 x 75mm, 4 x 75mm, 5 x 100mm, 6 x 125mm 5 Phillips head size: 6 x 38mm, 3 x 75mm, 4 x 75mm, 5 x 100mm, 6 x 125mm Material: Chrome Vanadium Steel Head type: Flat & Phillips Color: Green Handle: Non-Slip Magnetic tip: Yes Package size: 23×20×4cm Weight: 0.68kg Product Features: Made of premium chrome vanadium steel, with heat treatment, high hardness, good toughness, wear resistant, corrosion resistant, strong and durable, not easy to wear, deform, break. Comes with a magnetizer, the screwdriver can be easily demagnetized/magnetized by simply sliding it to the top or center of the instrument. Each screwdriver has a strong magnetic tip, easy to lift and fix the screw, effectively preventing the screw from falling and losing. With ergonomic non-slip handle, soft and comfortable feel, can provide stronger grip; The handle has a hole for easy hanging storage. Package Included: 5 x Flat head screwdriver 5 x Phillips head screwdriver 1 x 2 in 1 Magnetizer/Demagnetizer 1 x Tool Bag Wide Application: Comes with a dedicated storage bag, perfect for all types of work, included: building, electrical, mechanical, engineering, DIY and home, domestic use and general hobbyists.
